notes: Ryan dominated with eagles on 15 and 17 in the final round. Epic playoff avoided by clutch birdie on 18.
Record-breaking performance. Scotty shot a course record 67 in Round 2. Still talks about it.
Won in sudden death playoff. Made a 25-footer on the third playoff hole. Pure ice.
Grinded it out in brutal wind conditions. Never gave up, earned the nickname 'The Grinder'.
COVID year tournament. Limited field but 'The Claw' showed up clutch with short game magic.
First win for 'The Rock'. Steady as they come - no bogeys in the final 9 holes.
